creator: mph@astro.caltech.edu
text:
On Thu, Sep 16, 1999 at 11:33:08AM -0400, Seth wrote:
 
 > a+rx: not found
 > *** Error code 127
 
 Please make sure that /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk is up to date.  A
 new variable ${CHMOD} has been added, which the Mutt port uses.
 If your bsd.port.mk is older than version 1.316, that is almost
 certainly the problem.
 
 revision 1.316
 date: 1999/08/22 11:20:25;  author: asami;  state: Exp;  lines: +75 -16
 [...]
 (2) Add new variables CHMOD and CHOWN, set to full pathnames of those
     commands.  (Used in 3)
 
 -- 
 Matthew Hunt <mph@astro.caltech.edu> * Science rules.
 http://www.pobox.com/~mph/           *
